Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5C7C "SHADOWSWITCHER-5C7C" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Shadow Switcher (Dr. Wuro Industries - 2018).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $2F40 and $57E2 to remove disk access from the game.
